requirement.title: REQ-0203
requirement.requirement: The following functions for the car-to-infrastructure application have to be performed by the head unit: vehicle position updates have to be sent to the OEMVB (every x minutes / meters, to allow addressing of relevant vehicles) certain data from the vehicle network has to be collected by the HUH and has to be pre-processed according to algorithms provided by OEM the pre- processed data has to be sent regularly to OEMVB and notifications of dangerous spots have to be received received notifications have to be checked by the head unit for relevance for the driver (spots shall be map-matched) presentation of relevant notifications to the driver on the head unit HMI and the instrument cluster
